name: M&A Reaction Forecast
description: Predict market and stakeholder reaction to mergers, acquisitions, or major corporate restructuring
default_requirement: Simulate market and public reaction to this M&A announcement over 30 days. Focus on investor sentiment, employee concerns, competitive dynamics, and regulatory scrutiny.
system_prompt_addition: Focus on deal valuation dynamics, antitrust concerns, cultural integration challenges, synergy skepticism, and competitive repositioning. Track how sentiment evolves as more details emerge.
